title: firewalld bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.3.4-18.0.1]
- Red Hat Satellite and Red Hat high availaibility reference found in cockpit UI
  [Orabug: 30257573]
- discard empty RH-Satellite-6.xml [Orabug: 30328734]
- Remove capsule file as well, since it references removed config [Orabug: 33513329]

[1.3.4-18]
- fix(policy): allow-host-ipv6: allow MLD packets

[1.3.4-17]
- fix(server): load firewall rules before claiming dbus
- fix(nftables): ipset: add entries from GLib loop when idle
- fix(systemd): Requires dbus

[1.3.4-16]
- feat: add iperf{2,3} services
full_text:
[1.3.4-18.0.1]
- Red Hat Satellite and Red Hat high availaibility reference found in cockpit UI
  [Orabug: 30257573]
- discard empty RH-Satellite-6.xml [Orabug: 30328734]
- Remove capsule file as well, since it references removed config [Orabug: 33513329]

[1.3.4-18]
- fix(policy): allow-host-ipv6: allow MLD packets

[1.3.4-17]
- fix(server): load firewall rules before claiming dbus
- fix(nftables): ipset: add entries from GLib loop when idle
- fix(systemd): Requires dbus

[1.3.4-16]
- feat: add iperf{2,3} services

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-4187.html
